values.value:
Dear {!Primary_Applicant_Name__c},
Greetings from Runwal Enterprises!!
Thank you for sharing your referral with Runwal Enterprises. We truly appreciate your trust and the confidence you have placed in us by recommending us to your friends and family.
Our team will connect with your referral and assist them with the same care, transparency, and service that you have experienced with us.
We are grateful for your support in helping us grow the Runwal family.
Warm regards, Runwal Enterprises
Thank You for Your Referral – Runwal Enterprises

Thank You for Your Referral 🤝
We appreciate you referring your friends/family to Runwal. Your trust means a lot to us!
Thank You for Sharing Your Referral with Runwal Group
